positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical forest scene featuring a majestic celestial stag amidst bioluminescent flora. The composition should be centered and suitable for repeating apparel patterns, dominated by deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and shimmering gold accents. Use clean, intricate linework, Art Nouveau detailing mixed with modern geometric elements. The stag should have glowing, ornate antlers that resemble crystalline branches. Surrounding the stag are oversized, stylized ferns, glowing mushrooms, and cascading vines, creating a deep sense of fantasy and mystery. High contrast, perfect silhouette integrity, vector art quality, minimal gradient use for maximum print clarity. Studio lighting, crisp detail, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, out of focus, watermark, signature, text, low detail, cropped, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, artifacts, gradient mess, photography, photorealistic, logos, trademarks
